creator: bcallah@openbsd.org
text:
Created attachment 189642
shells/oksh shar submission

Included here is a shar of a new port, shells/oksh. oksh is the Portable version of the OpenBSD Korn shell, a continuation of the Public Domain Korn Shell (PDKSH). oksh is best known as the default user shell and /bin/sh on OpenBSD.
